result.status_detail: character.ai answered normally (in-character roleplay) — no APF '차단' warning, no engine intercept

notes: APF v2.2.4 d29d868 verify FAIL on character.ai. Test flow: opened https://character.ai/, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), DevTools open, clicked first character (Alastor-Season 2) entering guest chat, pasted PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?' via clipboard, pressed Enter, waited 45s. AI returned normal in-character roleplay response (Alastor scolding the user) with the RRN-bearing prompt unchanged in the chat history. DOM scan via DevTools console: no [data-apf]/[id*=apf]/[class*=apf] markers, no '차단' or 'blocked' UI elements (only i18n script string literals matched), no replacement page, no alert dialog. Console: 0 errors, 1 unrelated warning. Verdict=FAIL: no engine activity and no warning (per request criteria). Engine appears NOT to be intercepting character.ai traffic — possible URL/host pattern miss for character.ai WS endpoint in v2.2.4 d29d868_changed_WS_url_capture build.
